title: P4: TH_3 computation in initiator uses simplified non-CBOR concat
description: TH_3 comment notes 'ponytail: proper TH_3 needs CBOR encoding, using hash of concat'. Should implement full compute_th for TH_3 = H(TH_2, CIPHERTEXT_2, ID_CRED_R) with proper CBOR bstrs per RFC. Discovered in codereview pass 2 for project-LICHEN-7sa7. tagged codereview
close_reason: Fixed TH_3 in both initiator and responder to use compute_th with CIPHERTEXT instead of plaintext and proper CBOR. All codereview findings resolved.
